name: PingIdentity Stale Active Accounts (365 days)
description: Detects active PingIdentity accounts with no login activity for at least 365 days.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.name AS account_name, u.last_sign_on AS last_login FROM pingidentity_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.enabled, true) = true AND (u.last_sign_on IS NULL OR u.last_sign_on < NOW() - INTERVAL '365 days')
remediation: Disable long-dormant accounts and require formal approval before any reactivation.
